name: knowhow_document
description_zh: 根据文档 ID 获取 KnowHow 知识库中文档的完整内容。
description: Get the full content of a document from the KnowHow knowledge base by its document ID. Use this after knowhow_search to read the complete content of a specific document.

document_id.description: The document ID returned by knowhow_search results, e.g. 'abc123-def456'.
